 systemd-fsckd.service        loaded    active   running   File System Check Daemon on udev
 sys-kernel-config.mount     loaded    active   mounted   Kernel Configuration File System
 sshd.service                loaded    active   running   OpenSSH Daemon
 cron.service                loaded    active   running   Regular Cron Daemon
 docker.service              loaded    active   running   Docker Application Container Engine
 nginx.service               loaded    active   running   Nginx Web Server
 postgresql.service          loaded    active   running   PostgreSQL RDBMS
 systemd-journald.service    loaded    active   running   Journal Service
